name: Chicken Etouffee
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat a large skillet with Pam cooking spray; place over medium heat until hot.
2. Add onion and other vegetables, sauté until tender. Remove from skillet and set aside.
3. In the same skillet, add margarine and flour. Cook over low heat for 5 minutes, stirring constantly, until the mixture is a deep copper color.
4. Return vegetables to the skillet. Add chicken and remaining ingredients except rice and parsley.
5. Simmer for 2 minutes or until thoroughly heated.
6. Serve over hot cooked parboiled rice. Sprinkle with parsley.
